chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.200 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 10.03.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Mr. Ghulam Yaseen Mastoi, advocate for complainant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Muhammad Falak Sher Khan son of Sher Muhammad Khan, was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 24.01.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court and, as per Nazir’s endorsement, one Shaheen Begum wife Shair Muhammad Khan furnished surety for applicant/ accused. On 13.02.2025, surety, who is mother of applicant, along with urgent applicant moved application for change of surety, which was allowed and the surety furnished earlier was substituted by way of depositing defence savings certificates of Rs.100,000/-. On 17.02.2025, applicant/ accused was called absent, however, mother of applicant appeared and filed application for condonatin of his absence on the ground that her son Muhammad Falak Sher Khan is missing and the absence of applicant/accused was condoned for the said date. Today, the position is same, neither the applicant/accused is in attendance nor his counsel, therefore, interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused by this Court vide order dated 24.01.2025 is hereby recalled and the instant criminal bail application is dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
